rows.command_kor: TV 채널을 7번으로 바꾸고 1시간 뒤에 11번으로 바꿔줘.
rows.command_eng: Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour.

rows.command_kor: 에어컨을 냉방 모드로 설정하고 30분 뒤에 자동 모드로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes.

rows.command_kor: 공기청정기를 자동 모드로 설정하고 2시간 뒤에 수면 모드로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.

rows.command_kor: 에어컨 온도를 24도로 설정하고 1시간 뒤에 26도로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: Set the air conditioner temperature to 24 degrees and change it to 26 degrees after 1 hour.

rows.command_kor: 오븐 모드를 베이크로 설정하고 10분 뒤에 데우기 모드로 바꿔줘.
rows.command_eng: Set the oven mode to Bake and change it to warming mode after 10 minutes.

rows.command_kor: 재실 센서에 감지가 되면 1분 뒤에 사진을 찍어줘.
rows.command_eng: When the presence sensor detects someone, take a picture after 1 minute.

rows.command_kor: 오븐이 가열 모드가 되면 3초 뒤에 전자레인지 모드로 바꿔줘.
rows.command_eng: When the oven enters heating mode, switch it to microwave mode after 3 seconds.

rows.command_kor: 습도가 30%보다 낮아지면 3초 뒤에 스피커로 "습도가 낮습니다"를 출력해.
rows.command_eng: When the humidity falls below 30%, output "Humidity is low" through the speaker after 3 seconds.

rows.command_kor: 비가 오면 문을 닫고 1시간 뒤에 체크해서 비가 안오면 문을 다시 열어줘.
rows.command_eng: When it rains, close the door and check again after 1 hour; if it's not raining then, open the door again.

rows.command_kor: 외부 미세먼지 농도가 2000 이상이면 문을 닫고 4시간 뒤에 밸브를 잠궈줘.
rows.command_eng: If the dust level concentration is 2000ppm or above, close the door and close the valve after 4 hours.

rows.command_kor: 사이렌을 응급 모드로 울리고 5초 뒤에 사이렌 모드를 화재 모드로 바꿔줘.
rows.command_eng: Sound the siren in emergency mode and change it to fire mode after 5 seconds.

rows.command_kor: 조명 밝기를 30으로 설정했다가 10분 뒤에 80으로 올려줘.
rows.command_eng: Set the light brightness to 30, then increase it to 80 after 10 minutes.

rows.command_kor: 로봇 청소기를 자동 모드로 시작하고 30분 뒤에 수동 모드로 바꿔줘.
rows.command_eng: Start the robot vacuum cleaner in auto mode and switch to manual mode after 30 minutes.

rows.command_kor: 스피커 볼륨을 20으로 설정하고 10분 뒤에 40으로 높여줘.
rows.command_eng: Set the speaker volume to 20 and increase it to 40 after 10 minutes.

rows.command_kor: 제습기를 건조 모드로 작동시키고 1시간 뒤에 리프레쉬 모드로 바꿔줘.
rows.command_eng: Start the dehumidifier in drying mode and change to refreshing mode after 1 hour.

rows.command_kor: 거실의 모든 전등을 켜고 1시간 뒤에 꺼줘.
rows.command_eng: Turn on all lights in the living room and turn them off after 1 hour.

rows.command_kor: 집안의 재실 센서가 하나라도 감지되면 10초 뒤에 모든 긴급 사이렌을 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: When any presence sensor in the house detects presence, sound all emergency sirens after 10 seconds.

rows.command_kor: 주방의 모든 벨브를 열고 5분 뒤에 다시 잠궈줘.
rows.command_eng: Open all valves in the kitchen and close them again after 5 minutes.

rows.command_kor: 안방의 모든 블라인드를 닫고 2시간 뒤에 다시 열어줘.
rows.command_eng: Close all blinds in the bedroom and open them again after 2 hours.

rows.command_kor: 복도의 조명이 하나라도 켜지면 5분 뒤에 거실의 모든 조명을 꺼줘.
rows.command_eng: When any light in the hallway is turned on, turn off all lights in the living room after 5 minutes.

rows.command_kor: 연구실의 모든 제습기를 켜고 4시간 뒤에 꺼줘.
rows.command_eng: Turn on all dehumidifiers in the lab and turn them off after 4 hours.

rows.command_kor: 사무실의 공기청정기가 하나라도 수면모드로 바뀌면 10분 뒤에 조명을 꺼줘.
rows.command_eng: When any air purifier in the office switches to sleep mode, turn off the light after 10 minutes.

rows.command_kor: 창고의 모든 도어락을 잠그고 1분 뒤에 긴급 사이렌을 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: Lock all warehouse door locks and sound the emergency siren 1 minute later.

rows.command_kor: 테라스의 어느 조도 센서라도 100 럭스 이상이 되면 5초 뒤에 모든 블라인드를 올려줘.
rows.command_eng: When any illuminance sensor on the terrace reaches 100 lux or higher, raise all blinds after 5 seconds.

rows.command_kor: 데이터 센터의 어느 온도 센서라도 30도 이상이 되면 1분 뒤에 모든 에어컨을 냉방 모드로 작동시켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When any temperature sensor in the data center reaches 30 degrees or higher, set all air conditioners to cool mode after 1 minute.

rows.command_kor: 주방 조명을 켜고 10초 뒤에 주방 제습기를 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: Turn on the kitchen light and turn on the kitchen dehumidifier 10 seconds later.

rows.command_kor: 서재 공기청정기를 강풍으로 틀고 2시간 뒤에 꺼줘.
rows.command_eng: Set the study air purifier to high and turn it off after 2 hours.

rows.command_kor: 욕실 조명을 끄고 5분 뒤에 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: Turn off the bathroom light and turn on after 5 minutes.

rows.command_kor: 회의실 문을 닫고 3초 뒤에 회의실 카메라로 촬영해줘.
rows.command_eng: Close the meeting room door. After 3 seconds take a picture with the meeting room camera.

rows.command_kor: 지금 와인 셀러 온도를 체크하고 10분뒤에 다시 체크해서 1도 이상 차이가 나면, 스피커로 온도가 급변했다고 안내해줘.
rows.command_eng: Check the wine cellar temperature now and again in 10 minutes. If it has changed by 1 degree or higher, announce through the speaker that the wine cellar temperature has changed rapidly.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"WineCellarTemperatureChangeAnnouncement\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":600000,\"code\":\"prevTemp := (#TemperatureSensor).temperaturemeasurement_temperature\\nif (prevTemp != (#TemperatureSensor).temperaturemeasurement_temperature) {\\n  currTemp = (#TemperatureSensor).temperaturemeasurement_temperature\\n  diff = currTemp - prevTemp\\n  if ((diff >= 1) or (diff <= -1)) {\\n    (#Speaker).mediaplayback_speak(\\\"The wine cellar temperature has changed rapidly\\\")\\n  }\\n  prevTemp = currTemp\\n}\"}"]
